records.ety: [F. soubresaut a jump, leap, OF. soubresault, It. soprassalto an overleap, fr. L. supra over + saltus a leap, fr. salire to leap; or the French may be from Sp. sobresalto a sudden asault, a surprise. See Supra, and Salient.]

defs: A leap in which a person turns his heels over his head and lights upon his feet; a turning end over end.
quotes: Now I'll only Make him break his neck in doing a sommerset.
